key_insight: Finite element (FE) methods are the benchmark for solid mechanics simulations, yet their computational cost becomes prohibitive for problems with localised nonlinearities, fine-scale features, or long-time dynamic evolution.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: fem surrogates workflows and research evaluation.
